name: io.github.codespar/mcp-bigdatacorp
description: BR data enrichment + KYC. CPF / CNPJ / vehicle / property / antifraud datasets — look up a person by CPF and get name, DOB, address, employment, score, sanctions, social signals. Same for companies via CNPJ. Standard rail in BR e-commerce + lending agents for KYC, AML, fraud scoring. Catalog-row-only on this drop — package skeleton future work.

environment_variables.name: BIGDATACORP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: AccessToken header value from the BigDataCorp dashboard

environment_variables.name: BIGDATACORP_TOKEN_ID
environment_variables.description: TokenId header paired with the access token

tools.name: persons_lookup
tools.description: CPF lookup — name, DOB, mother's name, addresses, contacts, deceased flag

tools.name: companies_lookup
tools.description: CNPJ lookup — razão social, founding date, capital, partners, address, CNAE

tools.name: vehicles_lookup
tools.description: Vehicle lookup by placa / chassis / RENAVAM — make, model, ownership, restrictions

tools.name: properties_lookup
tools.description: Real-estate lookup by address or registration — owner history + value estimate

tools.name: financial_data
tools.description: Credit + financial profile — income, score, declared assets, banking, default history

tools.name: employment_data
tools.description: Employment profile — current employer, history, monthly income, category

tools.name: sanctions_check
tools.description: OFAC / UN / EU / BR PEP / court records / INSS / IBAMA screening

tools.name: social_signals
tools.description: Instagram / LinkedIn / Twitter / Facebook presence — fraud-scoring signal

tools.name: antifraud_score
tools.description: Composite fraud risk score (0-1000) with decision recommendation

tools.name: address_validation
tools.description: Address normalization + validation against CORREIOS + IBGE with geocode
